idea-plugin.name: PHP String Field
idea-plugin.description:
PHP String Field adds navigation and references support for string parameters of property names. Including nested fields accessed via dot notation ('profile.avatar.url').

Features: Navigation, reference and find usages support.

Usage

  • Add the @string-field to a @param phpdoc tag, to enable navigation through string path.

  • Use the @string-field:call to interpret the last field to be treated as a callable method.

Now you can navigate from 'profile.avatar.url' directly to the corresponding property in the class.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
[1.1.0] - 2025-11-06

Added
- Supports string-field parameters for class-string static calls.
